_comment: Deploy-readiness manifest — validated by `tooling/deploy-check`. Edit per site. requiredEnv: vars that must exist (locally and in the host). rejectPlaceholders: shipped default strings that must be gone before launch. smokeTest: the manual live-URL checks (Playbook PART 5).
smokeTest: On the DEPLOYED url (not localhost): submit a form → it saves + the email arrives
WhatsApp/tel links open the REAL number (wa.me is digits-only, no + or spaces)
Analytics dashboard receives events (after the processing delay)
Walk it on a real phone — images render, nothing overflows at 360px
Rendered <title> is correct per page type — site name appears once, not doubled
Privacy policy matches the analytics actually deployed
